name: Edo Tensei Zabuza (S)
pageTitle: Edo Tensei Zabuza (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Edo Tensei Zabuza (S) has been summoned from the dead against his will. His unique abilities will surely be put to use on the battlefield. Pics by: Pain_Alagoano

skills.name: Demon Shroud
skills.description: Zabuza emantes shroud putting pressure in the battlefield. For 1 turn, all enemies will have the cost of their harmful skills increased by 1 random chakra. Afterwards, any enemy affected by this skill will receive 5 additional damage from Zabuza's skills permanently. This effect stacks.

skills.name: Executioner Strike
skills.description: Zabuza executes one enemy dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy's skills will have 1 additional cooldown.

skills.name: Executioner Blade Absorption
skills.description: Zabuza steals 10 health from one enemy and for 1 turn, that enemy's harmful skills will cost 1 additional bloodline chakra.

skills.name: Demon Insight
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Zabuza (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
